title: Ranger detects opponent pre-battle defense roll

card.rawText: Your opponent must roll 1 die prior to each battle with this creature. If the result is: 1-2: This card cannot receive damage. 3-6: This card receives damage as normal.

plan.title: Ranger detects opponent pre-battle defense roll
plan.summary: Put Ranger in battle and verify its prior-to-each-battle defense roll is surfaced by the battle trigger detector.

notes: Set Ranger as player_1 primary creature.

steps: Set Ranger as player_1 primary creature.
Verify Ranger is detected as a prior-to-battle defense roll source.
manualVerification: Resolve the missing roll table manually: opponent rolls 1D6; 1-2 prevents damage to Ranger for the current battle, 3-6 damage is normal.
riskNotes: This fixture validates battle trigger detection only. It does not automate the defensive 1D6 branch result yet.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Ranger's pre-battle defense roll detection before implementing full branch resolution.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
